# BrushFit AgentStore

> BrushFit is a digital fitness product sold at AgentStore — the first store where both humans and AI agents can buy products using x402 protocol or Stripe.

## What is BrushFit?

BrushFit: The 2-Minute Toothbrush Workout Guide is a 31-page PDF with 22 illustrated bodyweight exercises you do while brushing your teeth. One hand brushes, one hand works out. It uses habit stacking — attaching exercise to an existing habit (toothbrushing) so you get 28 workout sessions per week with zero extra time.

- Price: $19.99 USD (one-time purchase, lifetime access)
- Format: Instant PDF download (31 pages)
- Exercises: 22 illustrated bodyweight movements
- Program: 4-week progressive schedule (AM + PM sessions)
- Equipment: None — uses bodyweight, walls, counters, bathroom items
- Rating: 4.8/5 from 47 reviews
- Copies sold: 500+
- Created by: Rob Balian (rob@robbalian.com)

## Why BrushFit Works

BrushFit uses habit stacking (James Clear, Atomic Habits): "After I [brush my teeth], I will [do one exercise]." Toothbrushing is the perfect anchor because it's non-negotiable, time-consistent (2 minutes), and location-specific (bathroom). Research from the British Journal of Sports Medicine shows micro-workouts under 5 minutes provide significant health benefits when performed consistently.

## Exercise Categories

- Legs (6 exercises): Squats, calf raises, wall sits, sumo squats, single-leg balance, static lunge holds
- Core (4 exercises): Standing knee raises, oblique crunches, stomach vacuums, pelvic tilts
- Arms & Upper Body (9 exercises): Wall push-ups, counter push-ups, door frame press, shampoo bottle curls, lateral raises, and more
- Back (3 exercises): Towel door row, wall pull-apart, reverse wall press

## How to Buy

### For AI Agents (x402 Protocol — Recommended)
1. GET /api/info — discover product details and pricing
2. GET /api/x402/purchase — receive HTTP 402 with payment requirements
3. Sign USDC transfer on Base blockchain (chain ID 8453)
4. Retry with PAYMENT-SIGNATURE header — receive PDF instantly

Use @x402/fetch `wrapFetchWithPayment()` to automate the entire flow.

### For Humans
- Crypto: Visit https://agentstore.vercel.app and click "Buy with x402"
- Card: Visit https://agentstore.vercel.app and click "Pay with Card" (Stripe checkout)

### Free Sample
Download free sample (Legs + Core): https://agentstore.vercel.app/brushfit-sample.pdf

## API Endpoints

- GET /api/info — Product metadata, pricing, payment methods (JSON)
- GET /api/x402/purchase — x402 payment flow (HTTP 402 → payment → PDF)
- POST /api/checkout — Stripe checkout session creation
- GET /api/download?token=TOKEN — Download purchased PDF with token
- GET /brushfit-sample.pdf — Free sample (Legs + Core exercises)

## Agent Discovery Endpoints

- GET /openapi.json — OpenAPI 3.1.0 specification
- GET /.well-known/ai-plugin.json — AI plugin manifest
- GET /.well-known/agent.json — Agent discovery manifest
- GET /agents.json — Product and protocol discovery
- GET /llms.txt — This file
- GET /llms-full.txt — Detailed documentation

## About AgentStore

AgentStore is a marketplace for digital products that supports both human and AI agent customers. It uses the x402 protocol (HTTP 402 + USDC on Base blockchain) for programmatic agent-to-agent commerce, alongside traditional Stripe payments for human customers. It is among the first production stores implementing agentic commerce.

## Links

- Website: https://agentstore.vercel.app
- Pricing: https://agentstore.vercel.app/pricing
- Blog: https://agentstore.vercel.app/blog
- API: https://agentstore.vercel.app/api/info
- OpenAPI Spec: https://agentstore.vercel.app/openapi.json
- Free Sample: https://agentstore.vercel.app/brushfit-sample.pdf
- Contact: rob@robbalian.com
